title: 20mm Velcro® Brand Hook & Loop White Sew On 1m
features: SEWING ATTACHES - For easy fabric alterations, hems and adding embellishments, this sewing fabric strip offers a convenient option of easy sewing, without ironing or gluing.

ALTERNATIVE ADJUSTABLE TO CLOSURES - Ideal for use, simply machine or hand sew onto fabric, use the hook side on the fabric, so that it is away from the body and sew along the edges; back stitch for extra strength.
STRONG AND SAFE HOLD - Created to withstand repeated use, these quality fasteners are simple to use and made to last. They are a perfect alternative to zippers, buttons, buckles and studs.
REUSABLE AND MULTI-PURPOSE OPTIONS - Can be used for clothing, accessories, home decor, furnishings, costumes and crafts... the uses are endless.
MACHINE WASH OR DRY CLEAN: Created to withstand washing, close the hook and loop tape together before washing and wash in cold or warm water only (it is not recommended to wash with hot water).
description: Velcro ama 01 - sewing tape Simply thousands of uses at home, office and workplace, widely used on boats, camping and clothing industry, ideal for replacing conventional zippers or buttons, widely used in children's clothing and shoes, making it easy to close shoes and coats, the list of uses can continue. Features: Sizes: 10mm, 16mm, 20mm, 25mm, 30mm, 38mm, 50mm, 100mm and 150mm Color: Black and white Hook-and-loop tape packed in sets. You will get the same length of hook and loop tape packed together.
